author: Paradajz

license.notes: No license text was found in the plugin header during intake. Confirm source URL and redistribution terms before moving out of imports/staging.

dependencies.notes: Plugin declares @base UltraMode7 and patches UltraMode7.mapToScreen.

initial_observations: Adds height offsets for terrain tags 1 through 5.
Overrides player passability using configured walkable and blocked region IDs.
Patches character sprite updates for airship elevation and forest transparency.
Uses RPG Maker globals including PluginManager, $dataMap, $gameMap, $gamePlayer, Game_Vehicle, Sprite_Character, Game_Player, and UltraMode7.
promotion_requirements: Verify source URL, license, and redistribution permissions.
Add compat fixture metadata under tests/compat/fixtures/plugins if retained as a plugin compatibility target.
Decide whether URPG should support this as JavaScript plugin compatibility, native terrain mesh behavior, or both.
Map required engine/editor support into the active AAA release readiness execution plan before implementation.
Add tests for terrain tag elevation, region passability overrides, vehicle/airship behavior, and UltraMode7 dependency handling.
